tweets.text:
“Nazi maggot ICE agents should be terrified…and subsequently executed…with two f**king bullets to the back of their Nazi maggot heads!”
 
After receiving this threat, ICE launched an investigation and identified Daniel Barber as the person who sent these death threats. Barber was arrested on April 10, 2026. He has a lengthy criminal history, including a conviction for murder and robbery with intent to cause bodily harm in 1990.
 
ICE law enforcement officers are facing an 8,000% increase in death threats. The violence and dehumanization of these men and women who are simply enforcing the law must END.
